title: Roles
description: Define permission sets that can be assigned to employees.

noRoles.title: No roles
noRoles.description: Create roles to assign permissions to employees

deleteConfirm: Delete role "{name}"? Employees assigned to this role will lose it.

permissions.workspace:archive: Archive / unarchive workspaces (soft remove, no data loss)

permissionDescriptions.doc:read:own_dept: View documents assigned to your department and Global documents (not tied to any department).
permissionDescriptions.doc:read:all: View all documents across every department. Typically for admins or librarians.
permissionDescriptions.doc:create:own_dept: Upload new documents and assign them to your own department only.
permissionDescriptions.doc:create:all: Upload new documents and assign them to any department in the system.
permissionDescriptions.doc:edit:own_dept: Edit document metadata (title, type, departments) for documents in your department.
permissionDescriptions.doc:edit:all: Edit metadata for any document in the system regardless of department.
permissionDescriptions.doc:delete:own_dept: Delete documents belonging to your department. This action cannot be undone.
permissionDescriptions.doc:delete:all: Delete any document in the system. Dangerous — only grant to trusted admins.
permissionDescriptions.wiki:read:own_dept: Read wiki pages scoped to your department and Global wiki pages.
permissionDescriptions.wiki:read:all: Read all wiki pages across every department.
permissionDescriptions.wiki:write:own_dept: Create and edit wiki pages within your department's scope.
permissionDescriptions.wiki:write:all: Create and edit any wiki page in the system.
permissionDescriptions.wiki:delete:own_dept: Delete wiki pages belonging to your department.
permissionDescriptions.wiki:delete:all: Delete any wiki page. Dangerous — only grant to trusted admins.
permissionDescriptions.skill:read:own_dept: View AI skills scoped to your department and Global skills.
permissionDescriptions.skill:read:all: View all AI skills across every department.
permissionDescriptions.skill:create:own_dept: Upload AI skills to your department.
permissionDescriptions.skill:create:all: Upload AI skills to any department.
permissionDescriptions.skill:edit:own_dept: Edit AI skills metadata for your department.
permissionDescriptions.skill:edit:all: Edit any AI skill in the system.
permissionDescriptions.skill:delete:own_dept: Delete AI skills belonging to your department.
permissionDescriptions.skill:contribution:review: Approve or reject proposed AI skill contributions.
permissionDescriptions.org:departments:read: View the list of departments and their details. Required for most admin views.
permissionDescriptions.org:departments:manage: Create, edit, and delete departments. Changes affect document access scopes.
permissionDescriptions.org:employees:read: View the employee directory including names, emails, and departments.
permissionDescriptions.org:employees:manage: Create accounts, edit profiles, and deactivate employees. Includes role assignment.
permissionDescriptions.org:roles:read: View the list of roles and their associated permissions.
permissionDescriptions.org:roles:manage: Create, edit, and delete roles and modify their permissions. Highly sensitive — controls who can do what.
permissionDescriptions.org:settings:read: View system configuration (AI providers, masked API keys). Read-only access.
permissionDescriptions.org:settings:manage: Modify system settings such as AI provider, model, and API keys. Admin-level privilege.
permissionDescriptions.org:audit:read: View the audit log tracking all system activities.
permissionDescriptions.workspace:view:all: View all workspaces even without being a member. By default, only admins have this.
permissionDescriptions.workspace:create: Create new workspaces. Useful for staff who run recurring events/projects without escalating to full system admin.
permissionDescriptions.workspace:archive: Archive a workspace (set status='archived') or unarchive it back to active. Soft-remove — preserves members, sources, and wiki. The canonical lifecycle ending for events/seasons. Granted to school leadership.
permissionDescriptions.workspace:delete: ⚠ PERMANENTLY delete a workspace including its member list and linked sources index. NOT the same as archive — archived data stays searchable. Prefer archive for normal lifecycle. Only grant for emergency cleanup; standard school deployments leave this UNGRANTED.
permissionDescriptions.workspace:members:manage: Add or remove members from any workspace and change their workspace roles, without being a workspace admin yourself. Useful for HR roles.
